title: DayNight Control
description: Customize day length, night length, sleep behavior, and HUD clock
body:
# DayNight Control

**DayNight Control gives you complete control over Minecraft's day and night cycle.**

Customize day length, night length, sleep behavior, and HUD clock settings while keeping everything synchronized in both singleplayer and multiplayer worlds.

---

### Configure day and night durations

Set custom day and night lengths in real-world minutes.

![Mod with Sharder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45bb48dd0c204052633cac5541446b24e62cedaa.gif)
</br>
---

###  Clock HUD

Visual day/night ring showing the proportion of day and night lengths.

![In-Game Clock HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0de30174fb7b77ddf8f4053007a44bac9dd77b03_0.webp)
</br>
---

###  Fast nights while sleeping

Sleep acceleration scales dynamically with the percentage of players sleeping.

![Night skip to 1 min instead of 6 min through sleeping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e25b635dd88f6221545b3f941089b293258cc9c1.jpeg)
</br>
---

###  Easy Configuration 

Fully configurable through [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) GUI.
</br>

![Mod Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1cf96968bd7f92a6de20ee4c9219e1cde3223ef.jpeg)
</br>

Also can be adjust from in-game console.
</br>

![Game Console](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b3281b9d95df6a25746ca59678e3e4a7ee192ff_0.webp)
</br>
---

### Multiplayer Ready

Server admins control the settings, clients automatically sync. </br>
Changes apply immediately without server restart.
</br>

![Connected to Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bddadc285941135460aa5d1e28005dd90efc8103.jpeg)
</br>
---

### Suggested Presets
</br>

| Type | Day | Night | Description |
|----------|-----|-------|-------------|
| **Vanilla** | 10 min | 10 min | Standard Minecraft |
| **Better Balance** <Default> | 12 min | 6 min | **Perfect for [Heart Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/heart-mod)** and ordinary gameplay|
| **Builder Friendly** | 30 min | 2 min | Maximum building time |
| **Hardcore Survival** | 8 min | 15 min | Challenging nights |
| **Speed Run** | 2 min | 1 min | Fast-paced gameplay |
| **Realistic** | 20 min | 10 min | 2:1 day/night ratio |
| **Casual** | 15 min | 5 min | Beginner friendly |
